name: GoGo Board 7 firmware version 3.2.4
body:
## This firmware powers the `GoGo Board 7`, unlocking advanced hardware capabilities that inspire children to explore computational thinking through creativity and play.

  ### What's new in this version

  #### Stability & Fixes
  - Fixed string operations (character-at, contains, string-length) in Logo programs that could cause incorrect results or crashes when used with the older coding style.
  - Fixed an issue where the web app would not be notified when an image displayed by a Logo program was no longer visible on the GoGo Board screen.
  - Fixed an issue where the web app would receive an invalid image report on a fresh start when no image had been shown.

  ### Minimum hardware requirement
  GoGo Board version 7 or above

  ### How to upgrade to this version
  - Auto update. When existing firmware is version 2.5.0 or above, update can take place within the [code.gogoboard.org](https://code.gogoboard.org) environment.
  - Manual update. Visit [install-firmware.gogoboard.org](https://install-firmware.gogoboard.org/) and follow the instructions.
    > [Firmware update manual](https://github.com/arnans/gogodoc/blob/main/firmware-update/firmware-update-guide.md)

  ### Known issues
  - Microphone not working. (in development)
  - IR transmitter not working. (in development)
